title: microsorum pseudoacrostichum
intro: Microsorum pseudoacrostichum, also known as Crocodile Fern or Java Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microsorum pseudoacrostichum include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and processing the leaves to make teas, infusions, and poultices for various health conditions.
